---
title: "Emma Butler"
---

## Emma Butler

**Dates:** (29 January 1813-21 Jan 1894)

**Maiden name:** (Barnett)

### Description

wife of the Very Rev. William John Butler and sister of Elizabeth Barnett

### Biography

She married (1843) Very Rev William John Butler. [<i>Life and Letters of Dean Butler</i>;  H. Barnett, <i>Glympton</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from January 17, 1894
- Letter from September [1870]
- Letter from Aug. 16, 1870.
- Letter from June 18th [1869]
- Letter from July 10th 1857
- Letter from June 30, 1851

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
